raw_text:
{
  "title": "Spicy Pineapple Carnitas Tacos",
  "description": "Tender, juicy pork carnitas slow-cooked with sweet pineapple and spicy peppers, then crisped and served in warm corn tortillas with fresh toppings for a bold, vibrant taco night.",
  "servings": 6,
  "prep_time_min": 25,
  "cook_time_min": 180,
  "difficulty": "Intermediate",
  "ingredients": [
    { "name": "Pork shoulder (boneless)", "quantity": 2, "unit": "lb", "prep": "cut into large chunks" },
    { "name": "Fresh pineapple", "quantity": 2, "unit": "cups", "prep": "diced, divided" },
    { "name": "Jalapeños", "quantity": 2, "unit": null, "prep": "sliced, plus extra for topping" },
    { "name": "Onion", "quantity": 1, "unit": null, "prep": "chopped" },
    { "name": "Garlic cloves", "quantity": 4, "unit": null, "prep": "minced" },
    { "name": "Orange juice", "quantity": 0.5, "unit": "cup", "prep": null },
    { "name": "Lime juice", "quantity": 0.25, "unit": "cup", "prep": "plus extra wedges for serving" },
    { "name": "Chipotle peppers in adobo", "quantity": 1, "unit": "tbsp", "prep": "minced (optional, for extra heat)" },
    { "name": "Salt", "quantity": 2, "unit": "tsp", "prep": null },
    { "name": "Black pepper", "quantity": 1, "unit": "tsp", "prep": null },
    { "name": "Dried oregano", "quantity": 1, "unit": "tsp", "prep": null },
    { "name": "Olive oil", "quantity": 2, "unit": "tbsp", "prep": null },
    { "name": "Corn tortillas", "quantity": 12, "unit": null, "prep": null },
    { "name": "Fresh cilantro", "quantity": 0.5, "unit": "cup", "prep": "chopped" },
    { "name": "Pickled red onions", "quantity": 0.5, "unit": "cup", "prep": null },
    { "name": "Lime wedges", "quantity": 1, "unit": null, "prep": "for serving" }
  ],
  "steps": [
    { "text": "Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Pat pork shoulder dry and season generously with salt, black pepper, and dried oregano." },
    { "text": "In a large Dutch oven or oven-safe pot, heat olive oil over medium-high. Sear pork pieces until browned on all sides, working in batches if necessary." },
    { "text": "Add onion, garlic, and sliced jalapeños to the pot. Sauté for 2–3 minutes until fragrant." },
    { "text": "Stir in 1.5 cups of diced pineapple (reserve 0.5 cup for caramelizing), orange juice, lime juice, and chipotle peppers in adobo (if using). Mix well, scraping up any browned bits." },
    { "text": "Cover and transfer the pot to the oven. Cook for 2.5–3 hours, turning pork pieces once or twice, until pork is very tender and shreds easily." },
    { "text": "Remove pork from pot and shred with two forks. Skim excess fat from the cooking liquid and return shredded pork to the pot, mixing with juices." },
    { "text": "Optional: For crispy edges, spread shredded pork on a baking sheet and broil on high for 3–5 minutes, or pan-fry in batches until crisp." },
    { "text": "While pork crisps, heat a nonstick pan over medium-high. Add reserved 0.5 cup diced pineapple and cook

expected.normalization_reason: Recipe JSON was missing recognizable ingredients and steps.
